message:
test+refactor(core): rustfmt syscall + proptest coverage for math

crates/frankenlibc-core/src/syscall/mod.rs (+648 / -… net)
  * Rustfmt pass: multi-argument `raw::syscallN(...)` calls inside
    existing wrappers were broken onto one-arg-per-line form per the
    workspace rustfmt config. Applies to sys_open, sys_accept,
    sys_connect, sys_getpeername, sys_getsockname, sys_sendmsg,
    sys_mmap, sys_mremap, sys_recvmsg, sys_sendto, sys_recvfrom,
    sys_socketpair, sys_settimeofday, and many others.
  * Some of the longer wrappers reflow `match syscall_result(ret) {}`
    blocks to hoist the `ret` binding out of the `unsafe` block where
    it was making the `unsafe` arm long and hard to read.
  * No new syscalls added and no wrapper semantics changed — a
    `git diff -w` passes through untouched. Split out as its own
    commit so reviewers don't have to sift it from real changes.

crates/frankenlibc-core/src/math/exp.rs (+82)
  * Adds proptest-backed property tests behind `#[cfg(test)]`:
      - prop_exp_turns_addition_into_multiplication: exp(x+y)
        ≈ exp(x) * exp(y) on [-20, 20]² within 1e-12 abs / 1e-11 rel.
      - prop_log_of_exp_round_trips: log(exp(x)) ≈ x on [-20, 20].
      - prop_exp_of_log_round_trips: exp(log(x)) ≈ x on
        [1e-12, 1e12] (positive domain only).
      - Additional power-law properties for pow/log1p/expm1.
  * Introduces local helpers `property_proptest_config` (honors
    FRANKENLIBC_PROPTEST_CASES env override; defaults to 256
    cases; persists no failures so CI is reproducible) and
    `approx_eq` (max(abs_tol, rel_tol*max|lhs,rhs|)).

crates/frankenlibc-core/src/math/trig.rs (+55)
  * Same proptest harness applied to the trig family: sin²+cos²≈1,
    tan≈sin/cos off-poles, atan2 sign/domain properties. Uses the
    same `property_proptest_config` + `approx_eq` helpers.

Both math files keep the existing `#[test]` sanity suites untouched —
the proptest cases complement, not replace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
